scene.description: Deep navy void (#0E1018) filled with slow-moving indigo and coral luminous signal trails, like data currents in space.

render_prompt: 12 second seamless ultra-wide 21:9 loop. Dark navy (#0E1018) abstract signal trails in indigo and coral slowly flowing. Center glow, edge vignette. CURA-style immersion, no text, loopable.
